creator: freebsd-maintainer@opera.com
text:
vuln.xml update is attached.

Please also reset the maintainer of the www/opera port to  
ports@freebsd.org or to any committer that would like to take the  
responsibility. I realize I don't have the time to update this port  
quickly enough after each Opera update, and updates will be faster if a  
committer is the maintainer in any case.

Arjan

-- 
Using Opera's revolutionary e-mail client: http://www.opera.com/mail/
